title: Moving Labs?
body:
The Lab has gone through so many iterations at this point that I’ve completely lost track of what version number we should call it. The aim is to provide a comfortable yet usable space for everyone that works here and to get to this point has been a monumental undertaking!

I’ve started design work on a new place, [REDACTED] that will work pretty well for continued research into [REDACTED].

The project list has outgrown MythOS and our Lab; or at least the instability of the experiments make this a dangerous place to continue.. So time for [REDACTED]!

I’ll keep this place connected to the Lab for the time being but that will need to change at some point.
AKO
‎
